strengths: 17+ years full-stack experience with current role using exact primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK)
Current staff-level position developing AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks—directly addresses the required emerging skill
Demonstrated TDD/testing philosophy through teaching, open-source work, and stated approach across multiple senior roles
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned in resume despite being primary stack requirement—though Node.js architecture experience is substantial
Testing frameworks Vitest and Playwright not mentioned; Python not listed in skills—gaps from 'proficiency in multiple languages' requirement
D language work (2016–2020) represents some technical divergence, though concurrent with primary TypeScript/Node responsibilities

key_factors.factor: Primary stack alignment (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS)

response.justification: Szabo significantly exceeds the 6+ year requirement with 17+ years of full-stack experience, and his current role at re:cinq directly aligns with emerging priorities: AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling. He has concrete, recent experience with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS) and demonstrates strong testing/TDD philosophy across his career. Architecture and senior-level thinking are evident from multiple staff roles and infrastructure responsibilities. Main gaps are Nest.js not being explicitly mentioned (though Node.js expertise is deep) and some secondary technologies (Vitest, Playwright, Python) not listed—these are learnable. His open-source contributions and community engagement reinforce alignment with the role's craftsmanship emphasis.
